clean.protocol_chain_tvl_daily.description: Daily total value locked (TVL) by protocol and chain, normalized to USD.

columns.chain: Blockchain network where the protocol is deployed.
columns.series_type: Type of TVL series tracked (e.g., total, staked, borrowed). Note: some protocols use 'main' instead of 'total'.
columns.total_liquidity_usd: Total value locked in USD across the protocol on the given chain.
columns.ingest_time: Timestamp when the row was ingested into the warehouse.

pctvl_ts_series_protocol_idx.description: Optimizes time-based queries by date and series_type, such as daily leaderboards or time-series rollups.

pctvl_chain_series_ts_inc_idx.description: Accelerates chain-specific lookups over time ranges, allowing index-only scans for TVL by chain queries.

pctvl_protocol_chain_series_ts_idx.description: Supports protocol-focused queries across chains and over time, such as tracking one protocol’s liquidity history.

pctvl_chain_series_ts_idx.description: Supports fast lookups when filtering directly on chain, series_type, and date ranges. Matches the model’s default query style without LOWER(), enabling efficient index-only scans for daily TVL by chain.

clean.etf_flows_daily.description: Daily net flows of crypto ETFs, showing capital inflows and outflows in USD terms.

columns.gecko_id: CoinGecko identifier for the asset or ETF.
columns.total_flow_usd: Net flow value in USD for the ETF (positive for inflows, negative for outflows).
columns.inserted_at: Timestamp when the row was ingested into the warehouse.

clean.lending_market_history.description: Historical time-series of lending market activity, including supply, borrow, debt ceiling, and APY metrics for each market.

columns.market_id: Unique identifier for the lending market.
columns.ts: Unix timestamp representing the snapshot time.
columns.project: Name of the protocol or project operating the lending market.
columns.chain: Blockchain network where the market resides.
columns.symbol: Token symbol associated with the market (e.g., DAI, USDC).
columns.total_supply_usd: Total value supplied in the market, expressed in USD.
columns.total_borrow_usd: Total value borrowed from the market, expressed in USD.
columns.debt_ceiling_usd: Maximum allowable debt or borrow cap for the market, in USD.
columns.apy_base_supply: Base annualized yield earned by suppliers (excluding rewards).
columns.apy_reward_supply: Reward portion of annualized yield for suppliers.
columns.apy_base_borrow: Base annualized interest rate charged to borrowers (excluding rewards).
columns.apy_reward_borrow: Reward portion of annualized yield for borrowers.
columns.inserted_at: Timestamp when the row was ingested into the warehouse.

clean.stablecoin_mcap_by_peg_daily.description: Daily stablecoin market capitalization, categorized by peg currency.

columns.peg: Pegged currency code (e.g., USD, EUR, JPY).
columns.amount_usd: Total stablecoin market capitalization in USD terms.
columns.ingest_time: Timestamp when the row was ingested into the warehouse.

clean.protocol_chain_token_holdings_dail.description: Daily snapshot of token holdings by protocol across different chains, with values normalized to USD.

columns.chain: Blockchain network where the holdings are located.
columns.series_type: Type of series being tracked (e.g., reserves, treasury, or other categories).
columns.token_symbol: Symbol of the token held by the protocol.
columns.amount_usd: Value of the holdings in USD terms.
columns.inserted_at: Timestamp when the row was ingested into the warehouse.

clean.bridge_volume_overview.description: Daily aggregated totals of bridge activity across all chains and bridges.

columns.deposit_usd: Total USD value deposited across all bridges.
columns.withdraw_usd: Total USD value withdrawn across all bridges.
columns.deposit_txs: Total number of deposit transactions across all bridges.
columns.withdraw_txs: Total number of withdrawal transactions across all bridges.
columns.inserted_at: Timestamp when the row was ingested into the warehouse.

clean.bridge_volume_daily.description: Daily breakdown of cross-chain bridge activity including USD volume and transaction counts.

columns.chain: Blockchain network associated with the bridge activity.
columns.bridge_id: Internal identifier for the specific bridge.
columns.deposit_usd: Total USD value deposited into the bridge on that day.
columns.withdraw_usd: Total USD value withdrawn from the bridge on that day.
columns.deposit_txs: Number of deposit transactions into the bridge.
columns.withdraw_txs: Number of withdrawal transactions from the bridge.
columns.inserted_at: Timestamp when the row was ingested into the warehouse.

clean.cl_pool_hist.description: Historical time-series of pool-level metrics including TVL and APY for DeFi protocols.

columns.pool_id: Unique identifier for the liquidity pool.
columns.ts: Unix timestamp representing the snapshot time.
columns.project: Name of the protocol or project.
columns.chain: Blockchain network where the pool resides.
columns.symbol: Token symbol or pool asset symbol.
columns.tvl_usd: Total value locked in the pool, expressed in USD.
columns.apy: Annual percentage yield (APY) for the pool, including rewards if applicable.
columns.apy_base: Base APY excluding rewards or incentives.
columns.url: Link to the pool or project page.
columns.inserted_at: Timestamp when the row was ingested into the warehouse.
